extortion.description: For over 50 years Gorrie-Regan has demonstrated a level of service that is unmatched to the industries we serve. Our founders established Gorrie-Regan as "a service company that sells products. Not only have we never wavered from this guiding principle, but it is stronger today than it was then. Our Time and Attendance Labor Management systems are backed by the best product implementation and support team in the Time and Attendance industry with thousands of installations. Gorrie-Regan systems fit into your existing computer environment and utilize your Microsoft network architecture along with browser, Ethernet, and security capabilities to their fullest.
